messages.subject: [R--gR] Help Filled contour graphics
messages.body_plain:
Hello

I'm working with filled contour graphics trough the filled.contour  
function.

I'd like to know how do I change the position of the key legend (the  
colour label). I can't find the argument.

Thank you very much,

Miguel Leal
messages.body_snippet:
Hello

I'm working with filled contour graphics trough the filled.contour  
function.

I'd like to know how do I change the position of the key legend (the

messages.subject: [R--gR] Help Filled contour graphics
messages.body_plain:
On Tue, 26 Feb 2008, Miguel Leal wrote:

> Hello
>
> I'm working with filled contour graphics trough the filled.contour
> function.

This mailing list is about "graphical models", not about statistical
"graphics". Please ask questions like this on R-help.

> I'd like to know how do I change the position of the key legend (the
> colour label). I can't find the argument.

I don't think that there's an option for it. If you want the legend in a
different place, you probably have to set it up yourself.
Z


> Thank you very much,
>
> Miguel Leal
>
> _______________________________________________
> R-sig-gR mailing list
> R-sig-gR at stat.math.ethz.ch
> https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-sig-gr
>
>
